'''dowabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:tubeless|tubeless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-w-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tubeless|tubeless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dowabaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dowabithi|dowabithi]] || [[word:dowabiji|dowabiji]] || [[word:dowabishi|dowabishi]] || [[word:dowabiki|dowabiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dowabuthuthu|dowabuthuthu]] || [[word:dowabujuju|dowabujuju]] || [[word:dowabushushu|dowabushushu]] || [[word:dowabukuku|dowabukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dowabuthu|dowabuthu]] || [[word:dowabuju|dowabuju]] || [[word:dowabushu|dowabushu]] || [[word:dowabuku|dowabuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dowabufthuf|dowabufthuf]] || [[word:dowabufjuf|dowabufjuf]] || [[word:dowabufshuf|dowabufshuf]] || [[word:dowabufkuf|dowabufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dowabethe|dowabethe]] || [[word:dowabeje|dowabeje]] || [[word:dowabeshe|dowabeshe]] || [[word:dowabeke|dowabeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dowabothotho|dowabothotho]] || [[word:dowabojojo|dowabojojo]] || [[word:dowaboshosho|dowaboshosho]] || [[word:dowabokoko|dowabokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dowabotho|dowabotho]] || [[word:dowabojo|dowabojo]] || [[word:dowabosho|dowabosho]] || [[word:dowaboko|dowaboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dowabofthof|dowabofthof]] || [[word:dowabofjof|dowabofjof]] || [[word:dowabofshof|dowabofshof]] || [[word:dowabofkof|dowabofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dowabÃŸfthÃŸf|dowabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dowabÃŸfjÃŸf|dowabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dowabÃŸfshÃŸf|dowabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dowabÃŸfkÃŸf|dowabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dowabÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|dowabÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dowabÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|dowabÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dowabÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|dowabÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dowabÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|dowabÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dowabÃŸfthÃŸf|dowabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dowabÃŸfjÃŸf|dowabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dowabÃŸfshÃŸf|dowabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dowabÃŸfkÃŸf|dowabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dowabÃŸfthÃŸf|dowabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dowabÃŸfjÃŸf|dowabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dowabÃŸfshÃŸf|dowabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dowabÃŸfkÃŸf|dowabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dowabÃḊthÃḊ|dowabÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:dowabÃḊjÃḊ|dowabÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:dowabÃḊshÃḊ|dowabÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:dowabÃḊkÃḊ|dowabÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dowabathatha|dowabathatha]] || [[word:dowabajaja|dowabajaja]] || [[word:dowabashasha|dowabashasha]] || [[word:dowabakaka|dowabakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dowabatha|dowabatha]] || [[word:dowabaja|dowabaja]] || [[word:dowabasha|dowabasha]] || [[word:dowabaka|dowabaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dowabafthaf|dowabafthaf]] || [[word:dowabafjaf|dowabafjaf]] || [[word:dowabafshaf|dowabafshaf]] || [[word:dowabafkaf|dowabafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dowabasha|dowabasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dowabshÃḋsha|dowabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dowabrosha|dowabrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dowabmusha|dowabmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dowabyasha|dowabyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godowabnkshÃḋsha|godowabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godowabnkrosha|godowabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godowabnkmusha|godowabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godowabnkyasha|godowabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dowawabasha|dowawabasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dowawabshÃḋsha|dowawabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dowawabrosha|dowawabrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dowawabmusha|dowawabmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dowawabyasha|dowawabyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godowawabnkshÃḋsha|godowawabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godowawabnkrosha|godowawabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godowawabnkmusha|godowawabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godowawabnkyasha|godowawabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dewÃḊbasha|dewÃḊbasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dewÃḊbshÃḋsha|dewÃḊbshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dewÃḊbrosha|dewÃḊbrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dewÃḊbmusha|dewÃḊbmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dewÃḊbyasha|dewÃḊbyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godewÃḊbnkshÃḋsha|godewÃḊbnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godewÃḊbnkrosha|godewÃḊbnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godewÃḊbnkmusha|godewÃḊbnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godewÃḊbnkyasha|godewÃḊbnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dowfabasha|dowfabasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dowfabshÃḋsha|dowfabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dowfabrosha|dowfabrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dowfabmusha|dowfabmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dowfabyasha|dowfabyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godowfabnkshÃḋsha|godowfabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godowfabnkrosha|godowfabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godowfabnkmusha|godowfabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godowfabnkyasha|godowfabnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
